title: Payoff Matrix for the Bach or Stravinsky (BoS) Game
description: A visual representation of the strategic interaction between two players, showing their available actions and the resulting payoffs.
relationships: Player 1 chooses a row, Player 2 chooses a column. The cell at the intersection shows their respective payoffs, with Player 1's payoff first. Both players prefer to coordinate, but each prefers a different coordinated outcome.
